caption: Three people sit in chairs on a dark stage lit by purple spotlights. On the left, a man wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers. In the center, a woman wears a black t-shirt with the words "OPEN UP" printed in white and black pants. On the right, a man wears a grey suit jacket and matching trousers. A white, intricately detailed robotic-looking box sits on the floor in front of the group. In the background, large neon letters spell out "SL.NY". Throughout the sequence, the three individuals remain seated, engaged in conversation. The man in the white shirt looks toward the others with a slight smile, while the woman and the man in the suit appear to be talking. The scene remains static in terms of positioning and setting, with only minor shifts in the people's posture and facial expressions as they interact.
